title: ageratina jocotepecana
intro: Ageratina jocotepecana, also known as Jocotepec ageratina or Hierba de San José, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Mexican folk medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Ageratina jocotepecana include relief from muscle and joint pain, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Ageratina jocotepecana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
